use tokio::sync::{mpsc, oneshot};
use std::sync::Arc;

struct Server {
    db: Arc<Db>,
    event_tx: mpsc::Sender<Event>,
}

impl Server {
    fn new(db: Arc<Db>) -> Self {
        let (event_tx, event_rx) = mpsc::channel(256);
        let db_clone = db.clone();
        tokio::spawn(collect_events(db_clone, event_rx));
        Self { db, event_tx }
    }

    async fn handle_request(&self, req: Request) -> Response {
        let result = process_request(&self.db, &req, &self.event_tx).await;
        Response { body: result }
    }
}

async fn process_request(
    _db: &Arc<Db>,
    _req: &Request,
    _events: &mpsc::Sender<Event>,
) -> String {
    todo!()
}

async fn collect_events(_db: Arc<Db>, mut rx: mpsc::Receiver<Event>) {
    while let Some(_event) = rx.recv().await {
        // process event
    }
}

struct Request { body: String }
struct Response { body: String }
struct Db;
struct Event;
